name: bloom-coffee
description: Bloom Coffee - Hệ thống quản lý quán cà phê (full-stack demo)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
